hero.title: Explore Peru with freedom and style
hero.subtitle: Rent2Go offers the best vehicle fleet in Peru. Modern, clean and secure cars for your trip.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.lead: Find answers to common questions about our rental service.

1.q: What is the minimum age to rent a vehicle?
1.a: The minimum age to rent a standard vehicle is 23 years. For luxury vehicles and SUVs, 25 years is required.

2.a: Valid license, ID or passport, and credit card in the driver's name.

3.a: We deliver with a full tank. If returned empty, a charge will apply.

4.a: Includes rental, basic insurance and unlimited mileage. Does not include fuel or fines.
